tags.name: `mc-toast`
tags.description:
Purpose: A toast notification component for displaying brief messages to the user.
Category: Layout, Actions
When to use: When you need to provide feedback to the user without interrupting their workflow.
When not to use: When you need to capture user input or require a more complex interaction.
Works with components: mc-button, mc-icon, mc-notification
Alternative component names: Toast Notification, Snackbar, Alert

Events:

  * `close` {`CustomEvent<string>`} - Emitted when the toast is closed.

Slots:

  * ` ` {} - The HTML content of the mc-toast.

  * ``trigger`` {} - The trigger element which triggers the toast.

Attributes:

  * `fit` {Fit} - Fit of the notification showed in the toast.
Can be: `small`, `medium`, `large`

  * `appearance` {ToastAppearance} - Appearance of the notification showed in the toast.
Can be: `neutral-default`, `neutral-inverse`, `info`, `success`, `warning`, `error`

  * `position` {Position} - Position of the toast.
Can be: `bottom-left`, `bottom-center`, `bottom-right`, `top-left`, `top-center`, `top-right`

  * `width` {`Width`} - Width style as number, the default value is 480px.

  * `duration` {number} - Duration of the toast in milliseconds

  * `open` {`boolean`} - Whether the toast should be initially opened.

Properties:

  * `timerId` {`Timeout | null`} - 

  * `start` {`number`} - 

  * `remaining` {`number`} - 

  * `animeDuration` {`number`} - 

  * `mcClosableComponent` {`McClosableComponent | null`} - 

  * `mcClosableComponentCloned` {`boolean`} - 

  * `allowedClosableComponents` {`string[]`} - 

  * `closeEventDispatched` {`boolean`} - 

  * `content` {`Node[]`} - 

  * `trigger` {`HTMLElement[] | undefined`} - 

  * `fit` {Fit} - Fit of the notification showed in the toast.
Can be: `small`, `medium`, `large`

  * `appearance` {ToastAppearance} - Appearance of the notification showed in the toast.
Can be: `neutral-default`, `neutral-inverse`, `info`, `success`, `warning`, `error`

  * `position` {Position} - Position of the toast.
Can be: `bottom-left`, `bottom-center`, `bottom-right`, `top-left`, `top-center`, `top-right`

  * `width` {`Width`} - Width style as number, the default value is 480px.

  * `duration` {number} - Duration of the toast in milliseconds

  * `open` {`boolean`} - Whether the toast should be initially opened.

  * `show` - Opens the toast

  * `hide` - Hides the toast

attributes.name: fit
attributes.description:
`fit` {Fit} - Fit of the notification showed in the toast.
Can be: `small`, `medium`, `large`

Property: fit

Default: medium

attributes.name: appearance
attributes.description:
`appearance` {ToastAppearance} - Appearance of the notification showed in the toast.
Can be: `neutral-default`, `neutral-inverse`, `info`, `success`, `warning`, `error`

Property: appearance

Default: neutral-default

attributes.name: position
attributes.description:
`position` {Position} - Position of the toast.
Can be: `bottom-left`, `bottom-center`, `bottom-right`, `top-left`, `top-center`, `top-right`

Property: position

Default: top-right

attributes.name: width
attributes.description:
`width` {`Width`} - Width style as number, the default value is 480px.

Property: width

Default: auto

attributes.name: duration
attributes.description:
`duration` {number} - Duration of the toast in milliseconds

Property: duration

Default: 5000

attributes.name: open
attributes.description:
`open` {`boolean`} - Whether the toast should be initially opened.

Property: open

Default: false

attributes.name: onclose
attributes.description: `close` {`CustomEvent<string>`} - Emitted when the toast is closed.
